ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was recorded */,
  "temperature_c" REAL /* Temperature in Celsius */,
  "dew_point_temp_c" REAL /* Dew point temperature in Celsius */,
  "relative_humidity" INTEGER /* Relative humidity percentage */,
  "wind_speed_km_h" REAL /* Wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "visibility_km" REAL /* Visibility in kilometers */,
  "pressure_kpa" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in kilopascals */,
  "weather_description" TEXT /* Description of the weather conditions */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation_m" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station in meters */,
  "wind_direction_deg" REAL /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "precipitation_mm" REAL /* Precipitation in millimeters */,
  "cloud_cover_percentage" INTEGER /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  "solar_radiation_w_m2" REAL /* Solar radiation in watts per square meter */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation_m" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station in meters */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization to which the user belongs */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the data accessed in bytes */,
  "query_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the query in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("record_id")
)
